labels.name: benchmarking
labels.description: Benchmark execution, metrics, or ranking topic.

milestones.title: 0.3.x Validation and Trust
milestones.description: Strengthen validation evidence, trust signals, and safe benchmark correctness checks.

milestones.title: 0.4.x Benchmark UX and Reporting
milestones.description: Improve CLI readability, exports, summaries, and report-friendly benchmark output.

milestones.title: 0.5.x Runtime, Logging and Connectivity
milestones.description: Harden connection handling, runtime diagnostics, and automation-friendly logging.

milestones.title: 0.6.x Persistence and Automation
milestones.description: Add saved benchmark history, reusable profiles, and lightweight automation workflows.

milestones.title: 0.7.x SQL Coverage and Agentic Optimization
milestones.description: Expand SQL rewrite coverage and add AI-assisted optimization workflows.

milestones.title: 1.0 Release Hardening
milestones.description: Finalize packaging, release checks, documentation, and stable operator experience.
